prompt_2_segments:
Hkrat ai shara hpe masha shara n-gun hpe hkrat ai response header map kaw shatsup u ai.

Ndai function gaw "lang", "encoding", "cache" hpe shara n-gun hte maren yu ai. Anhte gaw "Accept-Language", "Accept-Encoding", "Cache-Control" hpe maren shatsup ai.

Shara n-gun hpe yu ai shaloi, response header hpe shatsup ra ai. Shara n-gun hpe yu ai shaloi, function gaw original header hpe shatsup ai.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Add the appropriate response headers based on the user's locale.

This function checks the "lang", "encoding", and "cache" from the user's locale. We set "Accept-Language", "Accept-Encoding", and "Cache-Control" accordingly.

When checking the locale, the response headers should be set. When checking the locale, the function sets the original headers.

RSA hkrat n-gun ai shara hkrat ai, PEM format hte mungdan ai, shi hpe string hte galaw ai. "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" command hpe galaw ai hte shara hkrat ai.

@return The generated RSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if the key could not be generated.

prompt_4_bt_segments_en:

prompt_5_segments:

prompt_5_bt_segments_en:
